extraction.one_line_summary: GENIEZ Alexandre won the intermediate sprint ahead of VAN BAARLE Dylan in a breakaway reshuffle during crosswinds on Stage 12.
tactical_patterns: HERRADA Jesús strategically soft-pedaled at front being only 5:45 GC down, forcing others to chase while conserving energy.
Breakaway reformation in crosswinds favored heavier riders like VAN BAARLE Dylan who bridged aggressively before sprint finish.
YATES Simon personally pulled at GC group front when no teammates worked, revealing Mitchelton leadership burden despite red jersey.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: forced to pull personally at front of GC group when no other teams controlled gap
rider_signals.HERRADA Jesús: positive: tactically savvy to ride front softly being nearest GC threat from break at 5:45 deficit
rider_signals.GENIEZ Alexandre: positive: timed sprint perfectly to hold off stronger sprinter VAN BAARLE after breakaway reformation
rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: positive: bridged aggressively to breakaway in crosswinds but mistimed final sprint despite superior speed
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: actively hunting intermediate sprint points in green jersey despite stage not suiting him
